    How it worksDemoPricingBlogsAboutContactTerms & ConditionsSecurity/Privacy

    Abuse Reporting & Content Safety Policy

    How theRec.site investigates abuse reports and protects users, compliance, and platform integrity.

    1. Reportable conduct and content

    theRec.site may investigate reports and take action against content or activity involving:

    • Copyright infringement
    • Malware distribution
    • Fraudulent activities
    • Harassment or abuse
    • Illegal content
    • Sensitive personal information published without authorization
    • Attempts to compromise platform security

    2. Enforcement actions

    When necessary to protect users, legal compliance, or platform integrity, theRec.site reserves the right to:

    • Remove content
    • Disable public access
    • Suspend accounts
    • Permanently terminate accounts

    No prior notice is required when immediate action is necessary to address serious risk, illegal activity, or security threats.

    3. How to report abuse

    If you believe content on theRec.site violates this policy or applicable law, contact us through our Contact page with a description of the issue, relevant links or identifiers, and any supporting information. We review reports in good faith and may request additional details.

    4. Content moderation rights

    theRec.site is not obligated to monitor all uploaded content, but reserves the right to review, investigate, restrict, remove, or disable access to any content that may violate laws, policies, intellectual property rights, privacy rights, or platform security requirements.

    © 2026 theRec. All rights reserved.
